Our Awards

The ad man loves the prize. Candidate advertisers love it even more. Because he wants to stand out among thousands of newly graduated advertisers and show himself to the sector. It aims to get the key to success before starting professional life. He wants to participate in domestic and international competitions and taste the competition. He wants to add the award, which is the proof of his success, to the prize cabinet of the workshop. How about you? Do you like awards?
